burden.dalyPerCapita: low; risk of AF and bone loss in older adults

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Low TSH with normal free T4/T3; repeat testing and evaluate etiology

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with monitoring and dose adjustment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: TSH testing in urban centers; imaging in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation or treatment in high-risk patients; adjust thyroid hormone dose
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to radioiodine in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear management guidelines and access to monitoring
